owner_approval.approval_text: 批准，开始实施。把本地 README / GitHub Pages / cookbook / CLI docs 的 public copy 作为一个受控 public push lane 发布，并在发布前做 leak scan、URL verification、rollback commit 记录。

public_repo.publication_method: fast-forward git push from temporary public worktree rooted at GitHub main

verification.template_validation: python3 scripts/validate-case-study-templates.py -> case study templates validated: 4 files
verification.leak_scan: rg for local user paths, tailnet hostnames, ssh remotes, credential-shaped prefixes, environment-secret labels, and private-key markers over published files -> no matches
verification.pages_render_check: Playwright opened http://127.0.0.1:8765/docs/index.html from a temporary localhost server and snapshot showed the Decision preview first table

remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.uncertainty: GitHub Pages CDN publication can lag behind the source commit.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.constraint: Treat docs/index.html source URL and GitHub main commit as the auditable publication boundary; do not claim Pages CDN freshness until the public site is separately checked.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.test: source URL returns HTTP 200 and the local Playwright render shows the intended first-screen table
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.rollback: revert the content commit; no separate Pages build or CDN action was triggered

remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.uncertainty: A read-only target-fetch CLI could be misread as target evaluation or mutation.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.constraint: Default path reads an explicit local source path; remote README fetch is blocked unless --allow-network is supplied, and even then no clone, install, runtime, provider/model call, target write, issue, PR, or memory promotion is allowed.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.test: focused CLI test asserts local preview artifacts and blocked_network_not_approved for remote-only default
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.rollback: revert src/ctxvault/oss_case_study.py and the CLI registration

remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.uncertainty: Ordinary downstream OSS users may still need a package install or exact command path beyond public source instructions.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.constraint: Public README now starts with validate templates plus a single local-source preview command; this is a one-command preview after repo checkout, not yet a hosted bot or packaged installer.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.test: focused test imports the public CLI and runs oss-case-study-preview against a temporary local README
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.rollback: revert README quickstart and CLI command

remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.uncertainty: The publication could over-claim external OSS adoption or data-analysis coverage.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.constraint: Public copy claims only a preview path and public-safe examples; it does not claim broad external adoption, benchmark evidence, compatibility, runtime validation, maintainer endorsement, or stable protocol support.
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.test: claim templates and cookbook keep quality/security/performance/compatibility/endorsement/stable-protocol claims blocked
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.audit: safe rewrite cookbook, templates, and publication test
remaining_uncertainty_to_constraints.rollback: delete or supersede unsafe public copy through a corrective receipt
